name: Private AI
description: Private AI — PII redaction and classification API for text, audio, images, and documents.

seo.title: Private AI — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Private AI: Private AI — PII redaction and classification API for text, audio, images, and documents.

when_to_use: Redacting PII from text, documents, and audio before LLM processing
Building HIPAA-compliant AI pipelines with automated de-identification
Scanning and anonymizing sensitive data in real-time ingestion
Integrating PII detection into data preprocessing for ML pipelines

pros: Self-hosted deployment available for data residency
Covers text, audio, images, and documents
Strong compliance story for GDPR, HIPAA, PCI
cons: Not a general content moderation tool
Enterprise pricing, not cheap at scale
review.verdict: The redaction layer you deploy before other moderation or LLM steps; narrow purpose, excellent execution.
review.best_for: Regulated industries and LLM apps needing PII redaction before storage, training, or inference.
review.not_for: Teams that just need toxicity, NSFW, or general UGC moderation.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
